---
title: "Analytics materials"
---

## Slide decks

### Rise of Analytics

A reusable slide deck fragment explaining why modern analytics is successful: more data, more computing power, new algorithms, and new analytics processes.

- [Open the deck in a dedicated page](rise-of-analytics.qmd)
- Source fragment: [`_rise_of_analytics.qmd`](_rise_of_analytics.qmd)


#### Inline deck preview

```{=html}
<iframe class="inline-slide-deck" src="rise-of-analytics.html" title="Rise of Analytics slide deck preview" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```

Include shortcut:

```Markdown
{{{< include ../shared-teaching-materials/analytics/_rise_of_analytics.qmd >}}}
```

If the including course slide deck is in a subdirectory, adjust the leading `../` segments accordingly.
